results.rendered_html: a technical term for all the tenses and moods of a finite verb or for the terminations of those tenses and moods (also applied to some forms with kṛt affixes construed like a finite verb,  Pāṇ. ii, 3, 69 ; cf. iii, 2, 124 , and when accompanied by certain indicatory letters denoting each tense separately See laṭ; laṅ; liṅ; loṭ; liṭ; luṭ; ḷṭ; luṅ; ḷṅ; leṭ),  Pāṇ. iii, 4, 69 ; 77 , Sch.
